titleStmt.title: Veroli, Monumento Nazionale Abbazia di Casamari, MNC-002
Psalter

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Psalter
Mazmura Dāwit
msItem.incipit:
ፍካሬ፡ ዘጻድቃን፡ ወዘኃጥአን፡ መዝሙር፡ ዘዳዊት።
ወብፁዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘኢሖረ፡ በምክረ፡ ረሲአን።
ወዘኢቆመ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ኃጥአን።
ወዘኢነበረ፡ ውስተ፡ መንበረ፡ መስተሣልቃን።
msItem.explicit:
ወረገመኒ፡ በአማልክቲሁ።
ወአንሰ፡ ነሣእኩ፡ ዘእምላዕሌሁ፡ ሰይፈ።
ወመተርኩ፡ ርእሶ።
ወአሰሰልኩ፡ ፅዕለተ፡ እምደቂቀ፡ እስራኤል።

msItem.title: Book of Odes
Book of Odes, First Song of Moses () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2277salotu)
msItem.incipit:
ማኅልየ፡ ነቢያት፡ ወጸሎቱ፡ ለሙሴ። ፩።
ንሴብሕ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ስቡሕ፡ ዘተሰብሐ።
ፈረሰ፡ ወመስተጽዕነ፡ ወረወ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር።
msItem.explicit:
ወአስተጋብዓ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ላዕሌሆሙ፡ ማየ፡ ባሕር።
ወደቂቀ፡ እስራኤልሰ፡ ኃለፉ፡ እንተ፡ የብስ፡ ማዕከለ፡ ባሕር።
ማይሰ፡ ቆመ፡ ሎሙ፡ ዓረፍት፡ በይምን፡ ወዓረፍት፡ በጽግም።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Second Song of Moses () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2278salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ሙሴ፡ ዘዳግም፡ ሕግ። ፪።
አጽምዕ፡ ሰማይ፡ ወእንግርከ።
ወትስማዕ፡ ምድር፡ ቃለ፡ አፉየ።
msItem.explicit:
ወአምዕዑኒ፡ በአማልክቲሆሙ።
ወአነ፡ አቅንዖሙ፡ በዘኢኮነ፡ ሕዝብ።
ወአምዕዖሙ፡ ለሕዝብ፡ በዘኢይሌብው።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Third Song of Moses () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2703salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ሙሴ፡ ዘሣልሳይ። ፫።
እስመ፡ እሳት፡ ትነድድ፡ እመዓትየ።
ወታውዒ፡ እስከ፡ ሲኦል፡ ታሕተ።
msItem.explicit:
ይትቤቀል፡ ወይትፈደይ፡ በቀለ፡ ለፀሩ።
ወይትቤቀሎሙ፡ ለጸላእቱ።
ወያነጽሕ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ምድረ፡ ለሕዝቡ።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Hannah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2257salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ሐና፡ እመ፡ ሳሙኤል፡ ነቢይ። ፬።
ጸንዓ፡ ልብየ፡ በእግዚአብሔር።
ወተለዓለ፡ ቀርንየ፡ በአምላኪየ፡ ወመድኃንየ።
msItem.explicit:
ወውእቱ፡ ጻድቅ፡ ይኴንን፡ እስከ፡ አጽናፈ፡ ምድር።
ወይሁቦሙ፡ ኃይለ፡ ለነገሥትነ።
ወያሌዕል፡ ቀርነ፡ መሢሑ።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Prayer of Hezekiah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2258salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ይሁዳ። ፭።
አንሰ፡ እቤ፡ በኑኃ፡ መዋዕልየ።
ውስተ፡ አናቅጸ፡ ሲኦል፡ ኃደጉ፡ ዘተረፈ፡ ሐይወትየ፡ ዓመትየ።
msItem.explicit:
ወትረ፡ እሴብሐከ፡ ወእዜምር፡ ለከ።
በኵሉ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ሕይወትየ።
በቅድመ፡ ቤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Prayer of Manasseh () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2265salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ምናሴ፡ ነቢይ። ፮።
እግዚኦ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም።
አምላኮሙ፡ ለአበዊነ።
msItem.explicit:
እሴብሐከ፡ በኵሉ፡ ጊዜ፡ ወበኵሉ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ሐይወትየ።
እስመ፡ ኪያከ፡ ይሴብሑ፡ ኵሉ፡ ኃይለ፡ ሰማያት።
ወለከ፡ ሰብሐት፡ ለዓለም፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Jonah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2274salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ዮናስ፡ ነቢይ። ፯።
ጸራኅኩ፡ በምንዳቤየ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላኪየ።
ወሰምዓኒ፡ በወለተ፡ ከርሠ፡ ሲኦል። ወሰምዓኒ፡ ቃልየ።
msItem.explicit:
እለሰ፡ ዓቀቡ፡ ከንቶ፡ ወሐሰተ፡ ገደፉ፡ ሣህሎሙ።
አንሰ፡ ምስለ፡ ቃለ፡ ሰብሐት፡ በተጋንዮ፡ ዕሠውዕ፡ ለከ።
መጠነ፡ ጸለይኩ፡ በሕይወትየ፡ አዓስዮ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, First Song of the Three Youths in the Furnace () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2250salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ዳንኤል፡ ነቢይ፡ ስብሐት፡ ዘእምአዛርያ። ፰።
ይትባረክ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላከ፡ አበዊነ።
እኩት፡ ወስቡሕ፡ ስምከ፡ ለዓለም።
msItem.explicit:
ይትኃፈሩ፡ በኵሉ፡ ትዕግልቶሙ፡ ወይትቀጥቅጥ፡ ኃይሎሙ።
ወያዕምሩ፡ ከመ፡ አንተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክ፡ ባሕቲትከ።
ስቡሕ፡ በኵሉ፡ ምድር፡ ወበኵሉ፡ ዓለም።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Second Song of the Three Youths () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2271salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ሠለስቱ፡ ደቂቅ። ፱።
ይትባረክ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላከ፡ አበዊነ።
ስቡሕኒ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወልዑልኒ፡ ውእቱ፡ ለዓለም።
msItem.explicit:
ስቡሕኒ፡ አንተ፡ ወቡሩክኒ፡ አንተ፡ ለዓለም።
ቡሩክ፡ አንተ፡ በመልዕልተ፡ ሰማያት።
ስቡሕኒ፡ አንተ፡ ወ፡ አንተ፡ ለዓለም።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Third Song of the Three Youths () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT1566hababa)
msItem.incipit:
ኀበ፡ ባረኩ፡ አናንያ፡ ወአዛርያ፡ ወሚሳኤል። ፲።
ይባርክዎ፡ ኵሉ፡ ግብረ፡ እግዚእ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር።
ስቡሕኒ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወልዑልኒ፡ ውእቱ፡ ለዓለም።
msItem.explicit:
ይባርክዎ፡ አናንያ፡ ወአዛርያ፡ ወሚሳኤል፡ ለእግዚአብሔር። ስቡሕ።
ንባርኮ፡ ለአብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ።
ስቡሕኒ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወልዑልኒ፡ ውእቱ፡ ለዓለም።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Habakkuk () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2251salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ እንባቆም፡ ነቢይ። ፲ወ፩።
እግዚኦ፡ ሰማዕኩ፡ ድምፀከ፡ ወፈራህኩ።
ርኢኩ፡ ግብረከ፡ ወአንከርኩ። በማዕከለ፡ ፪ኤ፡ እንስሳ፡ ርኢኩከ።
msItem.explicit:
እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላኪየ፡ ወኃይልየ።
ዘይሠርዖን፡ ለእገርየ፡ ወለፍጻሜየ።
ወዲበ፡ ልዑላት፡ ያፄዕነኒ። ከመ፡ እማዕ፡ በማኅልይሁ።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Isaiah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2259salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡ ነቢይ። ፲ወ፪።
በሌሊት፡ ትገይስ፡ መንፈስየ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላኪየ።
እስመ፡ ብርሃን፡ ትእዛዝከ፡ በዲበ፡ ምድር።
msItem.explicit:
ሑር፡ ሕዝብየ፡ ወባዕ፡ ቤተከ።
ወዕፁ፡ ኆኅተከ። ወተኃባዕ፡ ኅዳጠ፡ ምዕረ።
እስከ፡ የኃልፍ፡ መዓቱ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Our Lady Mary () or Magnificat (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT1827Magnif)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ። ፲፫።
ተዓብዮ፡ ነፍስየ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር።
ወትትኃሠይ፡ መንፈስየ፡ በአምላኪየ፡ ወመድኃንየ፡
msItem.explicit:
ወፈነዎሙ፡ ዕራቆሙ፡ ለብዑላን። ወተወክፎ፡ ለእ፳ል፡ ቍልዔሁ።
ወተዘከረ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ዘይቤሎሙ፡ ለአበዊነ።
ለአብርሃም፡ ወለዘርኡ፡ እስከ፡ ለዓለም።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Zachariah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2275salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ዘካርያስ፡ ነቢይ። ፲ወ፬።
ይትባረክ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላከ፡ እስራኤል።
ዘተሣሃለኒ፡ ወገብረ፡ መድኃኒተ፡ ለሕዝበ፡ ዚአሁ።
msItem.explicit:
ወሠረቀ፡ ከመ፡ ያርእዮሙ፡ ብርሃኖ።
ለእለ፡ ይነብሩ፡ ውስተ፡ ጽልመት፡ ወጽላሎተ፡ ሞት።
ከመ፡ ያርትዕ፡ እግረነ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ሰላም።

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Simeon, or Nunc Dimittis () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2272salota)
msItem.incipit:
ጸሎተ፡ ስምዖን፡ ነቢይ። ፲ወ፭።
ይእዜ፡ ትስእሮ፡ ለገብርከ።
በሰላም፡ እግዚኦ፡ በከመ፡ አዘዝከ።
msItem.explicit:
ዘአስተዳሎከ፡ ቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሕዝብከ።
ከመ፡ ትከስት፡ ብርሃነ፡ ለአሕዛብ።
ወክብረ፡ ለሕዝብከ፡ እስራኤል።

msItem.title: Song of Songs
msItem.incipit:
ማኅልየ፡ ማኅልይ፡ ዝውእቱ፡ ዘሰሎሞን። ፩።
ይስእመኒ፡ በስዕመተ፡ አፉሁ።
አዳም፡ አጥባትኪ፡ እምወይን።
msItem.explicit:
ቃልከ፡ አስምዓኒ።
ጕይ፡ አንተ፡ ወልድ፡ እኁየ፡ ወተመሰላ፡ ለወይጠል።
ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ከመ፡ ወሬዛ፡ ኃይል፡ ውስተ፡ አድባረ፡ ድኁኃን።

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām
Wǝddāse Māryām, : Monday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ሰኑይ፡ ፈቀደ፡ እግዚእ፡ ያግዕዞ፡ ለአዳም፡ ኅዙነ፡ ወትኩዘ፡ ልብ፡ ወያግብዖ፡ ኀበ፡ ዘትካት፡ መንበሩ።
msItem.explicit: ወረሰይካ፡ ለሔዋን፡ ግዕዝተ፡ እምፃዕረ፡ ሞት፡ ወወሀብከነ፡ መንፈሰ፡ ልደት፡ ባረክናከ፡ ምስለ፡ መላእክቲከ። ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ቅድስት፡

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Tuesday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ሠሉስ፡ አክሊለ፡ ምክህነ፡ ወቀዳሚተ፡ መድኃኒትነ፡ ወመሠረት፡ ንጽሕነ፡ ኮነ፡ በማርያም፡ ድንግል፡
msItem.explicit: ይሰፍሑ፡ ክነፊሆሙ፡ ወይብሉ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ውእቱ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ስብሐት፡ መጽአ፡ ይስረይ፡ ኃጢአተ፡ ዓለም፡ በዕበየ፡ ሣህሉ።

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Wednesday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ረቡዕ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሠራዊተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ይብሉ፡ ብፅዕት፡ አንቲ፡ ሰማይ፡ ዳግሚት፡ ዲበ፡ ምድር፡
msItem.explicit: እስመ፡ መሐሪ፡ ውእቱ፡ መፍቀሬ፡ ሰብእ፡ አድኃነ፡ ነፍሳቲነ፡ በምጽአቱ፡ ቅዱስ። ሰአሊ፡ ቅድስት።

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Thursday
msItem.incipit:
ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ሐሙሰ፡ ዕፀ፡ እንተ፡ ርእየ፡ ሙሴ፡
በነደ፡ እሳት፡ ውስተ፡ ገዳም፡
msItem.explicit: በከመ፡ ሰበኩ፡ ነቢያት፡ አድኃነነ፡ ወቤዘወነ፡ ወረሰይነ፡ ሕዝቦ፡ ዚአሁ። ሰ። አ። ሊ። ለ። ነ። ቅ። ድ። ስ። ት።

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Friday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አም፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ዓርብ፡ ቡርክት፡ አንቲ፡ እምአንስት፡ ወቡሩክ፡ ፍሬ፡ ከርሥኪ፡ ኦማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡
msItem.explicit: እንዘ፡ ንብል፡ ቡርክት፡ አንቲ፡ ማርያም፡ ወቡሩክ፡ ፍሬ፡ ከርሥኪ፡ ተፈሥሒ፡ ኦምልዕተ፡ ጸጋ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ምስሌኪ።

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Saturday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ቀዳሚት፡ ሰንበት፡ ንጽሕት፡ ወቡርክት፡ ወቅድስት፡ በኵሉ፡ እንተ፡ ኃቀፈቶ፡ ለእግዚእ፡
msItem.explicit: ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ ወልድኪ፡ ኄር፡ መድኃኒነ፡ ይምሐረነ፡ ወይሣሃለነ፡ ይስረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ። ሰ። አ። ሊ። ለ፡ ነ፡ ቅ፡ ድስ። ት።

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Sunday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አም፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በዕለተ፡ ሰንበት፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ተሰመይኪ፡ ፍቅርተ፡ ኦቡርክት፡ እምአንስት፡ አንቲ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዳግሚት፡ ቀመር፡
msItem.explicit: ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ያጽንዓነ፡ በርትዕት፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ውስተ፡ አሚነ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ይጸግወነ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ወምሕረቶ፡ ይስረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ በብዝኃ፡ ምሕረቱ።

msItem.title: ʾAnqaṣa bǝrhān
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴ፡ ወግናይ፡ እሙ፡ ለአዶናይ፡ ቅድስት፡ ወብፅዕት፡ ስብሕት፡ ወቡርክት፡ ክብርት፡ ወልዕልት፡ አንቀጸ፡ ብርሃን፡ ማዕርገ፡ ሕይወት፡ ወማኅደረ፡ መለኮት፡
msItem.explicit: ሰብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ሰብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ሰብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ኦወላዲተ፡ እግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አኰቴት፡ ወክብር፡ ለአብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ይእዜኒ፡ ወዘልፈኒ፡ ወለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን። ወልድኪ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ይክፍለነ። ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ቅድስት።

support.p: Cuts, probably from parchment making, repaired on .

extent.measure: There is one blank protective page ().
extent.note: Data on folio dimensions taken from .

supportDesc.foliation: The MS was refoliated in pencil in the lower margin of each folio. The previous foliation in pencil in the upper margin differs by 3 from on.

signatures.note: Undecorated quire marks are written in the upper inner margin of the first leaf of each quire. The quire mark on is illegible due to erasure.

supportDesc.condition: Rebound and professionally restored in the Badia of Grottaferrata on 5 November 1977. The leather cover has been replaced by the book conservator. Likewise, the two pairs of sewing stations have been replaced with four pairs (see, e.g. , centerfold of the last quire). Some leaves are slightly stained with dirt, e.g. on . Traces of intensive use.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from .
layout.ab: Ruling and pricking are mostly visible. Both primary and ruling pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling. The bottom line is written above the ruling.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from .
layout.ab: Ruling and pricking are visible. Both primary and ruling pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling. The bottom line is written above the ruling.

handNote.desc: Fine handwriting, sometimes uneven, especially towards the end of the manuscript, e.g. . ስ and ሰ are not clearly distinguished.
handNote.seg: Several groups of lines on the incipit pages, alternating with black lines; numbers and titles of the psalms and of the canticles; incipits and numbers of the songs; name, number, and traditional interpretation of the Hebrew letters in Ps. 118; holy names; some letters of the word ይሴብሕዎ፡ (alternating with black letters) in Ps. 148; some letters of the word ሰብሕዎ፡ (alternating with black letters) in Ps. 150; elements of the punctuation signs, including text dividers, and of the numerals, including quire marks.

decoNote.desc: Unelaborate ornamental band in black and red ink on the top of the incipit pages of the Psalms of David.

item.desc: A long text crudely written in Amharic and partly effaced.

q.seg: ታሪክ፡ አለው፡ ለዚህ፡ ለ፲ሩ፡ ጅማት፡ ፈት፡ ሰጀመሮ፡ በየ፡ ሩሳሌም፡ መንግስት፡ ብፁዕ፡ ሰው፡ እሴይ፡ የሚባል፡ አባት፡ መልካካሞች፡ ጐልማሶች፡ ወልዶ፡ ፯፡ የኛ፡ ታናሽ፡ የበግ፡

item.desc: The note is written in Amharic and mentions several individuals: Dabtarā Gabra Māryām, Mam(h)ǝre Walda Kidān, Dabtarā Gabra Giyorgis, and others. The text is partly crossed out with a blue pen.

list.item:
Excerpt from John 1,1–5. The text is poorly written in pale black ink.
ቅድሜሁ፡ ቃል፡ ውእቱ፡ ወውእቱ፡ ቃል፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ውእቱ፡ ቃል፡ ሀለወ፡ ወእግዚአብሔር፡ ውእቱ፡ ቃል፡ ወከማሁ፡ ቀዳሚሁ፡ እም፡ ቀዲሙ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ውእቱ፡ ወኵሉ፡ ቦቱ፡ ኮነ፡ ዘእንበሌሁሰ፡ አልቦ፡ ዘኮነ፡ ወኢምንትኒ፡ .

note.q: ድሰዋ፡ መላእክት፡ ለበወስተ፡ ውሳጤ፡ መንጦላእት፡ ወይብልዋ፡ ሖኪ፡ ሐዳስዩ፡ ጣዕዋ። ይቤላ፡ መልአክ፡ ለተወከፊዮ፡ ለቃል፡ ኀቤኪ፡ ይመጽእ፡ ወበመኅፀነ፡ ዚአኪ፡ የሐድር። እፎ፡ ቤተ፡ ነዳይ፡ ኃደረ፡ ከመ፡ ምስኪን፡ እምሰማያት፡ ወረደ፡ ላዕሌሃ፡ ፈቲዋ፡ ስነ፡ ዚአኃ፡ ወተወልደ፡ እምኔሃ።

item.desc: Excerpt from Lk. 1,26–38. The excerpt is followed by salutations to Mary.

q.seg: ወበሳድስ፡ ወርኅ፡ ተፈነወ፡ ገብርኤል፡ መልአክ፡ እምኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ኀበ፡ አሐቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ዘገሊላ፡ እንተ፡ ስማ፡ ናዝሬት፡ ኀበ፡ ድንግል፡ እንተ፡ ተፍኅረት፡ ለብእሲ፡ ዘስሙ፡ ዮሴፍ፡ ዘእምቤተ፡ ዳዊት። ወስማ፡ ለይእቲ፡ ድንግል፡ ማርያም፡ ቦአ፡ መልአክ፡ ኀበሃ፡ ወይቤላ፡ ተፈሥሑ፡ ፍስሕት፡ አምልዕተ፡ ጸጋ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ምስሌኪ፡ ቡርክት፡ አንቲ፡ እምአንስት። ወቡሩክ፡ ፊረ፡ ከርሥኪ።

item.desc: The note, possibly an excerpt, is poorly written.
Minor writings in pencil, poorly readable, are written on a paper glued onto the inner side of the front board.
Some illegible writings in black ink have been washed out.
Minor writings in pencil, poorly readable.

Psalms are numbered. Some psalms are erroneously numbered (e.g. Pss 37 and 38 are numbered 38 and 39 respectively). Groups of ten psalms are separated with chains of red and black dots. The midpoint of the Psalms of David is indicated with the word መንፈቁ፡, encircled in black ink, on .
The inventory number "50427" is written in pencil in the lower margin of .

binding.decoNote: Two wooden boards covered with reddish-brown tooled .
Full cover of European provenance provided with buckles.

origin.origDate: The handwriting is consistent with an 18th-century dating.

bibl.title: Three Collections of Gǝʿǝz Manuscripts Recently Surveyed in Italy: An Inventory
Aethiopica
ብሉይ፡ ኪዳን። ዘተሰናአወ፡ ምስለ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ ቀደምት፡ ዘብራና፡ ወምስለ፡ መጻሕፍተ፡ ሶርያ፡ ወጽርእ፡ ወዓረብ ። <hi rend="italics">(Bǝluy kidān. Zatasanāʾawa mǝsla maṣāḥǝft qaddamt zabǝrānnā wamǝsla maṣāḥǝfta soryā waṣǝrʾ waʿārab)</hi>
The Ethiopic Psalter manuscripts: scribal practices and text arrangement

Essays in Ethiopian Manuscript Studies: Proceedings of the International Conference <hi rend="italics">Manuscripts and Texts, Languages and Contexts: the Transmission of Knowledge in the Horn of Africa</hi>, Hamburg, 17–19 July 2014
Supplement to Aethiopica

ውዳሴ፡ ማርያማ፡ Weddâsê Mârjâm. Ein äthiopischer Lobgesang an Maria, nach mehreren Handschriften herausgegeben und übersetzt. Inaugural-Dissertation zur Erlangung der Doktorwürde bei der Hohen Philosophischen Fakultät der Königlichen Universität Upsala
Aethiopische Marienhymnen
Abhandlungen der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften

series.title: Abhandlungen der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften
series.biblScope: 68, Abhandlungen der philologisch-historischen Klasse der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 33/4

bibl.biblScope: 68, Abhandlungen der philologisch-historischen Klasse der Sächsischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 33/4

bibl.title: The Ethiopic Version of the Song of Songs critically edited
The Ethiopic Translation of the Psalms
Knibb 2000
Der Septuaginta-Psalter und seine Tochterübersetzungen
'Gate of Light': an Ethiopian Hymn to the Blessed Virgin
Eastern Church Review

መጽሐፈ፡ መዝሙራት፡ ዘዳዊት — Psalterium Davidis aethiopice et latine cum duobus impressis & tribus MSStis codicibus diligenter collatum & emendatum, nec non variis lectionibus & notis philologicis illustratum, ut in præfatione pluribus dicetur. Accedunt Æthiopicè tantùm Hymni et Orationes aliquot Vet. et Novi Testamenti, item Canticum Canticorum, cum variis lectionibus & notis
bibl.publisher: prostat apud Johannem David Zunner et Nicolaum Wilhelmum Helwig

bibl.title: መዝሙረ፡ ዳዊት፡ ወጸሎታት፡ ዘነቢያት፡ (Mäzmurä Dawit wäsälotat zänäbiyat, ‘Songs of David [Psalter] and the Prayers of the Prophets’)

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Fixed lb and quire marks, expanded incipits, described some additiones
